dashboard.title: Dashboard y'Ekitongole
dashboard.welcomeMessage: Tukusanyukidde ku dashboard enkulu eya Kiini - enkola ey'okuddukanya ebitongole, amatabi, n'abakozi.

departments.title: Okuddukanya Amatabi
departments.description: Tonda, kyusa, era ggyawo amatabi munda mu kitongole kyo.

staff.title: Abakozi
staff.description: Laba era ofuge ebikwata ku bakozi b'ekitongole.

tiers.title: Emitendera gy'Ebitongole
tiers.description: Olukalala lw'emitendera egiriwo mu bitongole nga Ekitono, Ekya wakati, Ekinene.

types.title: Ebika by'Ebitongole
types.description: Laba oba londa ekika ky'ekitongole nga kkampuni ey'obwannannyini, NGO, oba ekitongole kya gavumenti.
